item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: The Matrix is about living Authentically
item.description: Edit2: I wanted to make a meme saying the creators of the Matrix are trans and their values and message were kind of the opposite of the maga red pills that picked up a lot of that... I find the irony amusing. I probably framed the meme itself a little off. I do think they would agree that taking the red pill would mean living authentically, especially with respect to being trans. I took it too far saying that's explicitly what they meant in the film... I dunno. It's a meme.
item.dc:creator: speroni

item.title: This place needs more rugby
item.description:
Strong girl. Lift?
Run, big fella!
Classic bants
Honestly, it do feel like that
It's an old meme sir, but it still checks out
Fuck that
I am confident I never caused a scrum penalty, but only because I never knew what they we ever called for
Keeping this one for next week. Preseason is starting again baby!
I hated this as a back, but as a forward, I knew they couldn't be trusted.
Scrums are the best fun you can have with 7 other guys! And I say that as a member of a predominantly gay rugby team!
I never looked as good in either position.
This one is also in my rugbygay folder... ?
He ruined the Wallabies too. Have so many memes about him from then, but he's gone now, so
We had a Bring Back Dave Rennie group chat going through this whole saga with the Wallabies.
It's an even older meme sir, and it doesn't really check out any more, should we shoot it down?
Just to show the boys can lift too. (Another one that's also in my rugbygay folder)
item.dc:creator: 11thHourGhost

item.title: Let's Talk Color Correction
item.description:
Welcome to my Classroom: I wanted to chat color correction today because of all the lovely comments on my photo from yesterday - folks intrigued by how I got this look to my cosplay. So here is a little behind the scenes view at just a little of what I do (as my full time job now :D) One of my favorite things to do when crafting video game cosplays, is to as closely match the look of in game characters - and on this cosplay of Syanna - I went all out. Photography - I shoot all my own content, you can often see a remote in my hand in the photos I take. For me, the photography side is what makes most of what I do so fun. It also means I get to control exactly what I shoot. So for this setup, I waited until sunset, with the natural daylight insanely low and beyond the horizon, giving me the perfect way to replicate night/evening without having to shoot in pitch black. This also allows my setup photography lights to cast an almost unnatural glow outside - to replicate torchlight. So with the photo taken ("Photo" - I take about 3,000 and pick 30 to finalize), we start: First off, I think what a lot of people call out as "Photoshop/AI/Filters" in the hands of a good photographer, is really mostly just color correction. I use a program called Lightroom to do all of mine. I see no issues with color correcting a photo. As you can see in my video comparison, an un-color corrected photo, actually looks pretty awful. And taking time to color content is a long process that I find very much worth it.
When it comes to tools during color correction - AI has been useful in assisting, never creating my work. I only use AI in my work when I want to do something as simple as background replacement or minor augmentation. I enjoy what I do, why let a robot do anything but something mundane so I can have fun creating. For example, I was able to erase the tube light in my hand in seconds, instead of mundanely clicking for 20 minutes with the clone stamp tool to do the exact same thing. I then took the image into photoshop so I could add the torch (png file) and fire to my liking. For me, that's about the extent of my use of these tools - and they are super handy for making what used to be difficult processed shots super easy. I often use these tools for things like this - unfortunately I can't create real magic in my hands, and for safety reasons I prefer using virtual fire, and not something I could burn myself with while I also shoot the shots.
Finalizing in Lightroom is fun. I fiddle with dials for hours, to color match to the look I want exactly. This allows my to add things like a light haze, which gives the illusion of a more video game feel, or I color tone to something a little more unnatural like this blue/purple feel to the environment, that also adds to the feeling on unreality I want to capture to match an "in-game" feel. The big thing for me though is the Bokeh/Depth of Field ability in post. I can create this look in camera, but Lightroom allows me to now adjust that feel in post by auto detecting backgrounds and subjects. In doing this, I can add "Bokeh" or a depth of field to the shot to my exact liking, which is also a bit of a reality stretch and gives a fun feel to my final product.
The final product!
And finally, here is another real world example of the same thing... Nobody wants to see a photo in "raw" form. These days, with the tools available. Photography isn't photography without color correction, at least in my opinion. That's it! Thanks for joining me... Class dismissed!
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Norway Blizzard (1/3am/2025): "It didn't snow the entire 2024 winter, but now it's like this. The snow is knee high at this point. -14c"

item.description: I'm finally feeling better. I was under the weather for around 3 weeks. I hope everyone is doing well and having a great day.
item.dc:creator: kaosnole95

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1232 (throbber)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Some of us at work are talking about running around Sedona in a Cookie Monster costume in the desert and spooking fellow jeep tours. I am 100% down for this idea.
Happy slug.
Accurate.
Take your meds.
I wish this was spelled correctly.
Speaking of religion, I dreamed that I was a Neanderthal in a Neanderthal community somewhere, and we had an old shaman with a withered arm, blind in one eye, who said he could talk to the sky and earth. Wr believed him. He was as old as the stars in the Sky. He painted my forehead with a line of red ochre and said that the summer flowers need not always follow the spring rain. He whispered around the fire that the bones of the earth were not always what they seemed and that the world was actually made of shadows in flickering flames. He died, and we buried him with all the flowers he used to heal us. We cried, and made cuts on our arm to drip our blood on the grave as we wailed, for it seemed he was older than time to the rest of our community, and we all hoped he would live forever, heal us forever, and that our children's children would hear him tell the stories of the first spear, and the time man stole fire from the stars, and we all felt lost.
Mmm, trilobites! Part of a balanced breakfast.
INFINITE RECURSION
Yeah this is what trying to find a place in Sedona is like.
They really do be
I'm pretty sure I'll never go on a date again, and that's okay.
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "What? Pippin. Good boy. [Unintelligible Conure muttering]"
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: 12 people have $2Trillion
item.description: The World Bank defines extreme poverty as living on less than $2.15 per day (2022 figures), which is roughly $784 per year per person. With $2 trillion, the number of people that could theoretically be lifted out of poverty for one year is: 2.5Billion people . -Fun fact , there is less than 1 billion people living under poverty worldwide , $1.216 trillion would remain after addressing the immediate needs of those 1 billion people for 1 year .
item.dc:creator: apachon

Working on the next magnet set! I may have to do two sperate sets. Too many characters I want to make haha.
Bender is up next.
item.dc:creator: vudumommajuju

item.title: It's been 13 years now..
item.description: A Guy in TF2 talking on the mic with a thick arab accent, > “You all go now. Go to fight the bad. I stay defend. They no get past. I stay. you go tight. I alone stay for to defend. Take their box. I stay.” > someone tells him to shut the fuck up > I tell them to shut the fuck up and let him talk if he wants (because I think he’s funny to listen to) > he adds me > every fucking game I play with him he does the exact same shit > “I am Tank. I wait by helicopter. You kill. I won’t let through. You kill. Boomer man, go vomit. I alone guard helicopter. You go.” > “You put portal there. Good. I wait. You discover answer. I know answer. Keep portal there. I will put portal when need. Keep putting portal. Good. Do you see? I wait. You put portal. Good.” > just talking non-stop every fucking game we play > arab spring starts > I have no idea where he lives > one day he sends me a message > “bad times friend ahead” > “maybe no computer” > “maybe no home” > “I will go way but we are two of soul” > “I will return” > Last Online: 615 days ago --- Picture originally posted by zultch: http://imgur.com/gallery/O3j9R0X
item.dc:creator: daydark1337

item.title: The more details come out, the more they don't add up
item.description: *Trump supporter and active military who was currently on leave *bragged to his wife two days before that he loved the Cybertruck because it felt like the videogame 'Halo' *His own father said that the explosives (fireworks and gasoline) are incredibly crude and he could have made something more sophisticated if he wanted *Elon Musk is now bragging about the "superior construction" of his product which prevented causalities *Nobody is talking about Trump/Elon supporting firing American workers and replacing them with H-1B immigrants which was all the news right before this happened
item.dc:creator: W0LFPAW

item.title: Aitzaz Hasan
item.description: January 6th is in a few days, marking this hero's anniversary for his sacrifice. Imgur promised to never forget.
item.dc:creator: senyu
